title: Codex Dream Skin - Build Week Demo
recommendedAudio: English TTS with Simplified Chinese subtitles using Taiwan-neutral terminology

audio.localVoiceoverSource: not packaged in the public repository
audio.localNormalizedEditAudio: not packaged in the public repository

automation.reason: Computer Use is not allowed to control the Codex app directly.

recordingRule: Run one silent mouse rehearsal before the user starts screen recording.

segments.screen: Competition cover followed by a clean native-versus-themed comparison.
mouseActions: Hold the cover for three seconds.
Advance to the native-versus-themed comparison.
Use only the neutral demo workspace.
segments.validation: Both states use the same neutral demo workspace and crop.

mouseActions: Select Image2 character category.
Select the original-usable status filter.
Open the active mecha-cat variant preview.
Close the preview and return to the library grid.
segments.validation: The library shows seven Image2 character variants and no broken images.

segments.screen: Workflow architecture visual followed by a prepared terminal gate result.
mouseActions: Advance to the workflow architecture visual.
Switch to the prepared terminal window.
Run the staged runtime gate command with one Return key action.
Pause on the passing module budgets.
segments.validation: Runtime tests and module budgets pass before activation.

segments.screen: Clean live Codex demo workspace with the theme active.
mouseActions: Move across the left navigation icons without opening personal workspace content.
Focus the composer to show the glass surface without sending text.
Open the large side panel to trigger character retreat.
Close the side panel and wait for the character to return.
Click only the angry trigger icon and wait for the table-flip animation to finish.
segments.validation: Native controls remain clickable, the character retreats and returns, and table-flip playback returns to idle.

segments.screen: Performance, cache, and restore evidence visual.
mouseActions: Advance to the optimized asset comparison.
Highlight PNG 2.33 MB to WebP 424 KB.
Advance to content-hash cache and idle animation lifecycle evidence.
segments.validation: Only measured project values are shown; no unsupported CPU or RAM percentage claim is used.

mouseActions: Advance through screenshot diagnosis, module matrix, and restore evidence.
Pause on the unified workflow state machine.
segments.validation: The screen explicitly names Codex and GPT-5.6 and shows their role in the workflow.

segments.screen: Prepared restore command followed by the final product mark.
mouseActions: Run the staged restore command with one Return key action.
Pause on the clean restored state.
Advance to the final Codex Dream Skin product frame.
segments.validation: Restore completes without changing official Codex application files.

recordingSafety: Use a neutral demo task with no private finance, client, account, or local-path content.
Do not send prompts or create external side effects during the mouse sequence.
Keep the TTS audio separate during capture and merge it in post-production.
Stop and restart the take if any private content or unexpected dialog appears.
